## Problem

A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation you are experiencing.

Example: "I'm always frustrated when ..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you would like. Be as specific as possible about the desired behavior.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered and why they are insufficient.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request here.
